summary: Tested MOJO Profile Modal drill-in inline editing feature. Backend bulk answers API (/api/pet-soul/profile/{pet_id}/answers/bulk) works correctly. Frontend MOJO modal opens from pet avatar, accordion sections expand/collapse, inline editor forms render with dropdowns and Save/Cancel buttons.

issues: Sections appear collapsed on initial open - user needs to scroll to see expanded Soul Profile content. This is by design but may confuse users initially.

context_for_next_testing_agent: MOJO Profile Modal inline editing is working. Access modal via: 1) Click pet avatar in Mira AI page (Ask Mira button from dashboard), 2) Click pet avatar ring in navigation. Soul Profile section is expanded by default showing TEMPERAMENT, NATURE, ENERGY, etc. Click Edit button to get inline form with dropdowns. Save button calls /api/pet-soul/profile/{pet_id}/answers/bulk. Test credentials: dipali@clubconcierge.in / test123
features_tested: MOJO Modal opens when clicking on pet avatar - WORKING
Each MOJO section has accordion expand/collapse - WORKING
Edit button visible when section expanded - WORKING
Soul Profile section inline editor shows dropdowns for temperament, energy level, play style - WORKING
Health Profile section inline editor available - WORKING
Diet & Food section inline editor available - WORKING
Behaviour & Training section inline editor available - WORKING
Save button triggers API call to /api/pet-soul/profile/{pet_id}/answers/bulk - WORKING
After saving, section content updates with new data - WORKING (verified via API)
Cancel button (X) closes the editor and returns to view mode - WORKING
